title: Vanilla+ Blocks
description: Adds all block variants (stairs, slabs, doors, trapdoors, buttons, fences, gates, pressure plates, walls) to vanilla blocks.
body:
![vanilla plus collection image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8500a2607675af1e0e0cb4da3c489d8cba4f4ec6_0.webp)
## GENERAL
**Vanilla+ Blocks** Mod is adding 2500+ of other block variants such as walls, fences, buttons or doors to (almost) every block in Minecraft. This mod is part of a **[Vanilla+ Mod Collection](https://modrinth.com/organization/vanilla+-collection)** covering most branches of Vanilla Minecraft.

![big title saying "Over 2500+ new blocks" with a few floating blocks around](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffbe74ea34c463ca4ca96d750c985ce8350c2a01.png)

## FUNCTIONALITY
**Vanilla+ Blocks** adds properties to certain block categories. Here is a list of them:
- _Concrete Powder:_ All blocks fall the same as sand and can be converted to their concrete counterparts by placing them in water.
- _Copper:_ Can be waxed/unwaxed and oxidize.
- _Glass:_ Are transparent (seamless transparency not implemented yet).
- _Redstone:_ Emit redstone signal of power 15.
- _Slime:_ Work the same as slime block and slow you down.
- _Sponge:_ Can dry off water (except doors). Wet sponge blocks can be dried in the nether.

## BUG TRACKING
If you find any bugs, visual problems etc. please visit the [Github issue tracker](https://github.com/Fellteros/vanillablocksplus/issues).
